868 DOWN_DPRSD_FREQ_CD DOWN_DPRSD_FREQ_CD D0150B2 Mood: Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has felt down, depressed, or hopeless. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
